page.content: In the provided table, the headers include λ, α, Acc., Prec., Recall, FP Rate, and Reject for both cv and test categories. The first data row (D 2, 1) shows values 0.828, 0.862, 0.512, 0.036, 0.021 for cv Acc., Prec., Recall, FP Rate, and Reject respectively, and 0.834, 0.862, 0.532, 0.037, 0.019 for test. The second row (D 2, 2) presents values 0.834, 0.907, 0.472, 0.021, 0.053 for cv and 0.837, 0.897, 0.484, 0.023, 0.056 for test. The third row (D 2, 5) indicates 0.833, 0.961, 0.327, 0.005, 0.123 for cv and 0.838, 0.963, 0.328, 0.005, 0.130 for test.
